title: Nessuno torna indietro
writer: Alba De Cespedes, Alessandro Blasetti, Vittorio Nino Novarese
actors: Elisa Cegani, Valentina Cortese, Maria Denis
plot: Seven young women in a boarding house in Rome during WWII: their aspirations and future hopes.Several keep memories of soldiers who are no longer alive, while others find new loves: a professor, an industrialist, a blind man.
